search_text: 2601.19873 Problem 12 / WU: weak-star basic sequence in C_p(X)^* for infinite compact X Constructive positive subcase when X contains a nontrivial convergent sequence, using delta_{x_n}-delta_x; novelty risk high because this subcase appears implicit from the source paper's metrizable-quotient theorem. solutions/partial/2601.19873_cp_convergent_sequence_weakstar_basic/
